title: acorus cochinchinensis
intro: Acorus cochinchinensis, also known as the Chinese rush or Shui chang pu, is a type of perennial herb belonging to the Acoraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acorus cochinchinensis include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating digestive problems and fever. Acorus cochinchinensis can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
